title: Confederated Tribes and Bands of the Yakama Nation - Tribal Codes and Resolutions
entity: Confederated Tribes and Bands of the Yakama Nation
publication_intent: NILL deliberately publishes a code table of contents, but its search result expressly states that the Nation did not permit the full text to be posted online.
discovered_via: Yakama Nation research data research permit IRB
notes: Default-refused: the search result says the Nation has not given permission for full-text online publication and directs users to contact the library; no probe or fetch performed.

title: Archives & Records — Colville Tribes
entity: Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation
publication_intent: Official Colville Tribes page deliberately lists the Research Permit Application, Research Regulation Ordinance Process, Chapter 6-6 Research Regulation PDF, and related resolutions.
discovered_via: site:colvilletribes.com Research Regulation Research Permit Chapter 6-6
notes: Search-only candidate landing page for Colville research-governance instruments; direct linked documents were not probed or fetched because this lane has no allowed hosts.

title: Chapter 6-6 Research Regulation
entity: Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation
publication_intent: Search result identifies the item as the Colville Research Regulation and reproduces its authority, purpose, and permit requirement; official Colville Archives & Records search result separately lists Chapter 6-6 as a published PDF.
discovered_via: Confederated Tribes Colville research policy data governance code
notes: Secondary academic holding; likely duplicate of the official Colville Chapter 6-6 item (src-wai-002 landing page) and possibly another lane/baseline record. Director should deduplicate; no probe or fetch performed.

title: Kalispel Tribe, Commerce sign memorandum of understanding to establish government-to-government relations
entity: Kalispel Tribe of Indians and Washington State Department of Commerce
publication_intent: Washington State Department of Commerce deliberately published a release describing the signed December 5, 2024 MOU and its data privacy, security, and Tribe-controlled information provisions.
discovered_via: Kalispel Tribe data sovereignty data sharing governance
notes: State-hosted evidence of an executed Tribe-State instrument; obtain and assess the agreement only after director host assignment and terms/robots review.

title: 2024 Kalispel LIHEAP Agreement
entity: Kalispel Tribe of Indians and Washington State Department of Commerce
publication_intent: A public Administration for Children and Families LIHEAP tribal-contracts search result identifies a signed agreement with a section titled Data sovereignty, data sharing and non-duplication of payments.
discovered_via: Kalispel Tribe data sovereignty data sharing governance
notes: Federal holding of a Nation-related agreement; publication and terms require a permitted probe before collection or analysis.

title: Archives and Collections
publication_intent: Official Spokane Tribe page deliberately states that collections are available to qualified researchers only after research clearance by the Tribal Business Council and Tribal Historic Preservation Officer.
discovered_via: Spokane Tribe research clearance research permit
notes: Published official research-access governance page; it may describe a process rather than a separately published instrument. Flag for human review; no probe or fetch performed.

title: Preservation Program
publication_intent: Official Spokane Tribe Preservation Program page deliberately states its mission includes protecting cultural heritage, historic records, cultural materials, and intellectual property.
discovered_via: Spokane Tribe research clearance research permit
notes: Published official program page relevant to IP and cultural-material stewardship, but its legal force and whether it is a data-governance instrument need human review; no probe or fetch performed.
